rawContent:
## Tomorrow's Forecast for Orcas Island, WA (Friday, Feb 20, 2026)

| Condition | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| **High** | 41°F |
| **Low** | 37°F (overnight) |
| **Sky** | Mostly cloudy |
| **Precipitation** | 30% chance of rain/snow showers after 4am Friday night; little to no snow accumulation |
| **Wind (Day)** | Southeast ~6 mph (light) |
| **Wind (Night)** | East 7-10 mph |
| **Wind Chill** | 25-35°F |

### Island Travel Conditions
**Ferry-friendly day** – Light winds (6 mph SE) during the day make for calm conditions on the ferries. Evening brings slightly stronger east winds (7-10 mph) but still manageable. No major wind gusts expected until Saturday (22 mph gusts).

### Looking Ahead
Saturday brings increasing precipitation (40% chance rain/snow mix) with stronger winds and gusts up to 22 mph. Sunday onward shows rain likely through early next week.
content:
**Orcas Island Forecast – Friday, Feb 20**

☁️ Mostly cloudy, high 41°F, low 37°F. Wind chill 25-35°F.

**Ferry Travel:** Excellent conditions. Light SE winds (6 mph) make for smooth crossings. Evening winds pick up slightly (7-10 mph E) but remain calm. No delays expected.

**Outdoor Activities:** Dress warmly—wind chill is brisk. Dry conditions until after 4am when light rain/snow showers possible (30% chance, minimal accumulation).

**Heads Up:** Saturday brings stronger winds with 22 mph gusts and increased rain/snow chances. Plan ferry trips and outdoor activities for Friday if possible.
